/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Helix.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Helix.dir/src/platform/main_linux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Helix.dir/src/platform/platform_linux.cpp.o -o Helix  libhelix_engine.a -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz _deps/curl-build/lib/libcurl.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
